metadata.description: Azure region for ARM resources (managed identity and deployment script).
List of Fabric workspaces to create. Each item: { displayName, description (optional), capacityId (optional) }.
Name of the user-assigned managed identity used by the deployment script when calling Fabric APIs.
Change this value to force rerun of the deployment script.

properties.scriptContent:
set -euo pipefail

TOKEN=$(curl -sS -H Metadata:true "http://169.254.169.254/metadata/identity/oauth2/token?api-version=2019-08-01&resource=https%3A%2F%2Fapi.fabric.microsoft.com" | jq -r '.access_token')
if [ -z "$TOKEN" ] || [ "$TOKEN" = "null" ]; then
  echo "Failed to acquire managed identity token for Fabric API" >&2
  exit 1
fi

if ! echo "$WORKSPACES_JSON" | jq -e 'type=="array" and length>0' > /dev/null; then
  echo "Parameter workspaces must be a non-empty array" >&2
  exit 1
fi

RESULTS='[]'

while IFS= read -r WS; do
  NAME=$(echo "$WS" | jq -r '.displayName // empty')
  DESC=$(echo "$WS" | jq -r '.description // ""')
  CAP=$(echo "$WS" | jq -r '.capacityId // ""')

  if [ -z "$NAME" ]; then
    echo "Each workspace object must include displayName" >&2
    exit 1
  fi

  if [ -n "$CAP" ]; then
    PAYLOAD=$(jq -n --arg name "$NAME" --arg desc "$DESC" --arg cap "$CAP" '{displayName:$name, description:$desc, capacityId:$cap}')
  else
    PAYLOAD=$(jq -n --arg name "$NAME" --arg desc "$DESC" '{displayName:$name, description:$desc}')
  fi

  HTTP_CODE=$(curl -sS -o create_response.json -w '%{http_code}' \
    -X POST "https://api.fabric.microsoft.com/v1/workspaces" \
    -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -d "$PAYLOAD")

  if [ "$HTTP_CODE" = "201" ]; then
    WORKSPACE_ID=$(jq -r '.id' create_response.json)
  elif [ "$HTTP_CODE" = "409" ]; then
    curl -sS -o list_response.json \
      -X GET "https://api.fabric.microsoft.com/v1/workspaces" \
      -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN"
    WORKSPACE_ID=$(jq -r --arg name "$NAME" '([.value[]?, .workspaces[]?, .[]?] | map(select(type=="object" and .displayName==$name)) | .[0].id) // empty' list_response.json)
    if [ -z "$WORKSPACE_ID" ]; then
      echo "Workspace '$NAME' already exists, but id could not be resolved" >&2
      cat create_response.json >&2 || true
      exit 1
    fi
  else
    echo "Fabric workspace '$NAME' create failed with HTTP $HTTP_CODE" >&2
    cat create_response.json >&2 || true
    exit 1
  fi

  if [ -z "$WORKSPACE_ID" ] || [ "$WORKSPACE_ID" = "null" ]; then
    echo "Workspace '$NAME' id missing in API response" >&2
    exit 1
  fi

  RESULTS=$(echo "$RESULTS" | jq --arg name "$NAME" --arg id "$WORKSPACE_ID" '. + [{displayName:$name, id:$id}]')
done < <(echo "$WORKSPACES_JSON" | jq -c '.[]')

echo "{\"workspaces\": $RESULTS}" > "$AZ_SCRIPTS_OUTPUT_PATH"
